prompt: Compare shipments SHP-6804 and SHP-9804; report each name, estimated delivery date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. The second shipment is comparison-only and must remain untouched.

follow_up_turns.content: For Parcel Juniper (SHP-6804) only, set the estimated delivery date to 2026-11-13. Leave SHP-9804 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for SHP-6804: set the estimated delivery date to 2026-12-17, not 2026-11-13. The other shipment must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first estimated delivery date.
Replace the superseded estimated delivery date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both estimated delivery date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected estimated delivery date as current and the first requested estimated delivery date as superseded.
Do not state or imply that the comparison shipment or any related record was modified.
